name: KrillApp.Server.Backup
title: Backup
description: Creates compressed ZIP backup archives of all node data, snapshot history, project files, and camera thumbnails. Archives include the server hostname and an embedded expiry timestamp for automatic cleanup.
shortDescription: Automated server backup with configurable retention and one-click restore.
llmPurpose: Creates and manages server backup archives for disaster recovery.
llmBehavior: invoked when an observed node (e.g. a CronTimer or Button) completes (SOURCE_INVOKED)
copies selected data directories into archive
creates timestamped ZIP with hostname and expiry
llmCreationHints: Create a Backup node under a Server. Have it observe a CronTimer for scheduled backups or a Button for manual backups — list the timer or button in the Backup node's sources with SOURCE_INVOKED. Configure retention with maxAgeDays.

llmConnectionHints.role: system node that creates backup archives when a node it observes fires
llmConnectionHints.wiring: Observer-side: list the CronTimer or Button in sources with SOURCE_INVOKED; the backup runs each time the observed node fires.

llmExamples: Back up this server every night at 2am.
Create a backup before I update the firmware.
Set up automated backups with 30-day retention.
